assignments.name: Assign_Change_Control_Requests_to_variable
assignments.label: Assign Change Control Requests to variable

assignments.name: Assign_Filtered_to_Change_Control_Request
assignments.label: Assign Filtered to Change Control Request

assignments.name: Assign_filtered_to_change_control_requests
assignments.label: Assign filtered to change control requests

assignments.name: Assign_recently_updated_CCRs_to_list
assignments.label: Assign recently updated CCRs to list

Flow.description: Provides the GR a list of their open Change Control Requests
Flow.label: GMS - Change Control Request List

recordLookups.name: Get_Approved_rejected_CCRs_since_last_log_in
recordLookups.label: Get Approved/rejected CCRs since last log in
recordLookups.filterLogic: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND (5 OR 6 OR 7)

variables.description: The filtered list of change control requests ready for display to the GRL
variables.name: varChangeControlRequests

variables.description: the status filter for the change control requests valid values are: notAwaitingChanges, awaitingChanges
variables.name: varFilter
